qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School or section: General Humanities.
Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: APS 30-35; Preference is given to higher English results.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts in Law
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School or section: General Humanities.
Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: Applicants who wish to take Law courses in first year must meet the admission requirements for Law; APS 40-42; Preference is given to higher English results.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts in Digital Arts
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School or section: Wits School of Arts.
Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: APS 30-35; Subject to place availability; Preference is given to higher English results.

Additional selection criteria: Applicants must meet the academic entrance criteria set by the University; Applicants must successfully complete an interview, audition, portfolio or written assignment at the Wits School of Arts; Selection activities take place from May 2026; Admission depends on successfully fulfilling both academic and school-specific selection criteria.

Teaching subjects: Physical Sciences; Life Sciences; Engineering Graphics and Design; Geography; History; IsiZulu Home Language; IsiZulu First Additional Language; Sesotho Home Language; Sesotho First Additional Language; Information Technology; Mechanical Technology Auto; Mathematics; Technical Mathematics.

notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
